title: Crasher's Loot Chests
description: This project adds an additional way to gain cool loot in a formula akin to certain rpg games!
body:
# Crasher's Fantastical Loot Chests (CLC For Short!)
## This mod was made with MCreator.
### Welcome to CLC for 1.20.1 forge & 1.21.1 Neoforge! (No plans for porting elsewhere--for now.)

**This Mod Needs Geckolib to run!**

![Seen here is a chest in a biome from [Biomes O' Plenty!](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty/versions)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0de010ffd7d7d3f60434e4035682ce0b8931d0c7.png)

CLC adds in a plethora of loot chests for a more RPG based feel to looting, in the same air as mods like the original [Loot Bags](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lootbags)..

How do you get them? You kill a mob, and occasionally, it'll drop a chest. Then, you right click this chest to obtain loot from a few loot pools!

You can obtain chests of different rarities based on the health of the mob and just random chance. With entities ABOVE 100 health dropping the coveted Legendary Chest at a 50/50 chance.

I made this mod specifically for personal use on a little fun modpack I made for me and some friends. But I decided, hey, why not, and have shared it with y'all for funsies! hopefully it's a nice little thing to have around..

(KNOWN ISSUES)

Sound indicator for the chest spawning but no chest spawning. Unsure why this happens, probably an mcreator thing, hopefully not a big issue!

Also ice and fire myrmexes will just attack chests...unsure? Why that is?
